meaning: adj.冷淡的,有支架的n.离岸,避开,冷淡,抵销,和局,平衡
examples: There is no sign of an end to the standoff between Mohawk Indians and the Quebec provincial police.
This won't be a standoff or a dogfall.
"Unfortunately, the standoff will continue," he said.
Every statehouse and public employee union in the nation should be watching the standoff in Wisconsin.
This could be a way to help resolve this expected standoff with the union over revenues.
